_doc: Raven Hollow vendor definitions (design/SMART_NPCS.md 3). Consumed by SmartNPCSystem; the shop UI (scenes/ui/shop.tscn) is a dumb view over this. Keyed by npc id (scripts/npc_data.gd cast ids). type = vendor archetype; stock ids resolve through LootSystem.roll_item / Items.get_item (guarded) so icons + rarity come free. price = gold to BUY (buy > sell always, per ITEM_PROGRESSION 7). open_from/open_to mirror the vendor's work hours; outside them the shop is shut.

blacksmith.name: Goran the Blacksmith
blacksmith.greeting: Mind the sparks. Need something with an edge?

merchant.name: Merchant Tibalt
merchant.greeting: Finest goods this side of the old road.

innkeeper.name: Innkeeper Marta
innkeeper.greeting: Sit yourself down before you fall down.
